task: I need to text a coworker about covering my section for the last hour because something came up. Can you help me put together a message that gets the point across clearly and doesn’t overcomplicate it?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a simple text you can send:

**“Hey, something came up and I need you to cover my section for the last hour tonight. I appreciate it — I’ll make it up to you.”**

If you want, I can also make it a little more casual or more professional.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear. I’d send it like that.
